display.purpose: Hero titles, page-defining phrases, and authored spotlight moments.

headline.purpose: Article titles, section anchors, and dialog headers with real weight.

body.purpose: Long-form reading with comfortable leading and calm density.

label.purpose: Navigation, metadata, code labels, and utility text.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive lift for cards and linked blocks.

motion.name: hover-shift
motion.purpose: Card hover, sticky caption tinting, and gentle feedback.

motion.name: character-reveal
motion.purpose: Per-character intros on authored brand surfaces.

components.name: Primary Pill Button
components.description: Compact navigation and utility action for the light theme.
components.css: .ds-btn-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:4px; padding:8px 10px; border:none; border-radius:999px; background:oklch(0.93 0.0305 212.05); color:oklch(0.5 0.1102 250.04); font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-pill:hover { background:oklch(0.95 0.0059 239.82); color:oklch(0.5 0.1102 250.04); } .ds-btn-pill:active { transform:scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-pill:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.75 0.0883 226.04); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Dark Confirm Button
components.description: Dominant confirm action for dialogs and dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-dark { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-width:80px; padding:8px 10px; border:none; border-radius:999px; background:oklch(0.5 0.1102 250.04); color:oklch(0.98 0 0); font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-dark:hover { background:oklch(0.64 0.1176 239.66); } .ds-btn-dark:active { transform:scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-dark:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.84 0.0632 214.03); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Editorial Input
components.description: Soft utility field for comments, auth, and search-like input.
components.css: .ds-field { display:grid; gap:8px; font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); } .ds-field-label { color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); } .ds-input { width:100%; border:1px solid oklch(0.93 0.0358 205.23); border-radius:8px; background:oklch(0.93 0.0358 205.23); color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); padding:8px 12px; font:400 16px/1.75 "Noto Serif", "Noto Serif SC", "Noto Serif JP", serif; transition:border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); opacity:0.75; } .ds-input:hover { background:oklch(0.95 0.0059 239.82); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:oklch(0.64 0.1176 239.66); background:oklch(0.98 0 0); }

components.name: Article Card
components.description: Primary linked summary block for article browsing.
components.html:
TypeScriptVue

A Garden Note About Frontend Systems

Quiet summary copy that stays readable and never over-explains.

2026-05-031280 chars
components.css: .ds-article-card { display:grid; gap:0; overflow:hidden; border-radius:24px; background:oklch(0.98 0 0); color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); box-shadow:0 4px 6px -1px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.10), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.10); transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-article-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); background:oklch(0.93 0.0305 212.05); box-shadow:0 10px 15px -3px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.10), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.10); } .ds-article-media { aspect-ratio:3 / 2; background:linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.95 0.0059 239.82), oklch(0.93 0.0358 205.23)); } .ds-article-body { display:grid; gap:12px; padding:16px; } .ds-article-tags { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; } .ds-article-tag { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; border-radius:999px; background:oklch(0.27 0 0); color:oklch(0.98 0 0); padding:4px 8px; font:400 12px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; } .ds-article-title { margin:0; font:700 20px/1.3 "Noto Serif", "Noto Serif SC", "Noto Serif JP", serif; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); } .ds-article-copy { margin:0; font:400 16px/1.75 "Noto Serif", "Noto Serif SC", "Noto Serif JP", serif; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); } .ds-article-meta { display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); }

components.name: Top Navigation Bar
components.description: Lightweight translucent top bar with pill actions and a centered brand anchor.
components.css: .ds-top-nav { display:grid; grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto; align-items:center; gap:12px; min-height:48px; padding:0 8px; border-radius:999px; background:rgb(255 255 255 / 0.53); color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); box-shadow:0 4px 6px -1px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.10), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.10); backdrop-filter:blur(12px); } .ds-top-nav__brand { justify-self:center; font:700 18px/1.2 "Noto Serif", "Noto Serif SC", "Noto Serif JP", serif; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); } .ds-top-nav__actions { display:flex; gap:8px; } .ds-top-nav__ghost { border:none; border-radius:999px; background:transparent; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); padding:8px 10px; font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-top-nav__ghost:hover { background:oklch(0.93 0.0305 212.05); color:oklch(0.5 0.1102 250.04); } .ds-top-nav__ghost:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.75 0.0883 226.04); outline-offset:2px; } .ds-btn-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:4px; padding:8px 10px; border:none; border-radius:999px; background:oklch(0.93 0.0305 212.05); color:oklch(0.5 0.1102 250.04); font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-pill:hover { background:oklch(0.95 0.0059 239.82); } .ds-btn-pill:active { transform:scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-pill:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.75 0.0883 226.04); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Dialog Surface
components.description: Simple modal panel with serif heading and one clear dominant action.
components.html:
Prompt

Use dialogs for decisions that cannot stay inline.
components.css: .ds-overlay { display:grid; place-items:center; padding:24px; background:rgb(0 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-dialog { width:min(520px, 90vw); border-radius:16px; background:oklch(0.98 0 0); color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); padding:20px; box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.18); } .ds-dialog__header { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:20px; } .ds-dialog__title { margin:0; flex:1; font:700 32px/1.2 "Noto Serif", "Noto Serif SC", "Noto Serif JP", serif; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); } .ds-dialog__copy { margin:0; font:400 16px/1.75 "Noto Serif", "Noto Serif SC", "Noto Serif JP", serif; } .ds-dialog__footer { display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:12px; margin-top:20px; } .ds-dialog__close { border:none; background:transparent; color:oklch(0.16 0.0413 254.41 / 53.33%); padding:8px 10px; border-radius:999px; font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-dialog__close:hover { background:oklch(0.93 0.0305 212.05); } .ds-dialog__close:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.75 0.0883 226.04); outline-offset:2px; } .ds-btn-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:4px; padding:8px 10px; border:none; border-radius:999px; background:oklch(0.93 0.0305 212.05); color:oklch(0.5 0.1102 250.04); font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-pill:hover { background:oklch(0.95 0.0059 239.82); } .ds-btn-pill:active { transform:scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-pill:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.75 0.0883 226.04); outline-offset:2px; } .ds-btn-dark { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-width:80px; padding:8px 10px; border:none; border-radius:999px; background:oklch(0.5 0.1102 250.04); color:oklch(0.98 0 0); font:400 14px/1.4 "JetBrains Mono", monospace; cursor:pointer; transition:background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-dark:hover { background:oklch(0.64 0.1176 239.66); } .ds-btn-dark:active { transform:scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-dark:focus-visible { outline:2px solid oklch(0.84 0.0632 214.03); outline-offset:2px; }

narrative.overview:
Grey Flowers should feel like a personal study garden translated into interface form. The site is not trying to sell urgency. It is trying to hold writing, code, memory, and self-description inside one calm, authored atmosphere. The visual system should make room for browsing and reading, with gentle rhythm, soft contrast shifts, and just enough motion to suggest care.

This is an editorial brand surface with a technical backbone. Serif text carries the voice because the words matter, while monospaced labels and metadata keep navigation, code, and interface controls precise. Light mode should feel like paper laid over a faint grid. Dark mode should feel like the same garden after sunset, still legible, still calm, never neon.

This system explicitly rejects Generic AI SaaS landing-page cliches, Neon cyberpunk dev-blog dark mode, Glassmorphism-heavy personal portfolio, and Hard-edged enterprise dashboard chrome. The site should read as quietly cultivated, not optimized for attention extraction.
keyCharacteristics: Reading-first layout with soft editorial pacing.
Blue used as a signal color, not a constant flood.
Dark mode as a nocturnal companion, not a separate brand.
Rounded surfaces that feel gentle, not toy-like.
Technical details rendered with restraint and clarity.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue carries interaction, selection, and emphasis. Do not invent a second accent family for decoration.

rules.name: The Shared Weather Rule
rules.body: Light mode and dark mode must feel like the same place under different light. Do not turn dark mode into a neon remix.

rules.name: The Serif Carries Meaning Rule
rules.body: If the content is meant to be read, let serif carry it. Mono is for signals, metadata, and code, not for replacing the reading voice.

rules.name: The Lift On Purpose Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear when a surface needs separation or response. They are not ambient decoration.

dos: Do keep the page atmosphere lightly gridded in light mode and charcoal-toned in dark mode.
Do reserve Blue Petal for interaction, selected state, and a few deliberate highlights.
Do use serif for reading surfaces and JetBrains Mono for labels, metadata, and code-adjacent UI.
Do let cards, drawers, and dialogs feel rounded and calm rather than sharp or glossy.
Do preserve the same emotional weather across light and dark themes.
donts: Don't build Generic AI SaaS landing-page cliches into hero sections, cards, or callouts.
Don't turn dark mode into Neon cyberpunk dev-blog dark mode.
Don't add Glassmorphism-heavy personal portfolio treatments to dialogs, nav, or cards.
Don't harden the UI into Hard-edged enterprise dashboard chrome.
Don't use pure black, pure white, or loud accent stacking when one blue family already carries the system.
